How It Works

Your Path to Driving Away Happy

From your first application to driving away, we handle every detail — so you can focus on the road ahead.

1

Quick Application

Fill out our 60-second form. Soft credit check only — no impact on your score. We get to work immediately.

2

We Find You Approved

We shop your application across our network of 30+ Canadian lenders to secure your approval at the best possible rate — even with bad credit, no credit, or a past bankruptcy.

3

Pick Your Vehicle

Browse thousands of pre-qualified vehicles across Canada. Your finance specialist matches you with options that fit your budget and approval terms.

4

Drive Away Today

Sign from home or in-store and drive away — most customers are approved and on the road within 24–48 hours. Free home delivery available in most provinces.

Why Canada Car Approvals

Built to Approve You

We don't just submit applications — we fight for your approval. Our network of lenders and dealers means more options, better rates, and faster approvals.

01
All Credit, All Welcome
Bad credit, no credit, bankruptcy, consumer proposal, or new to Canada — we have lender programs designed for every situation.
02
30+ Lender Network
We submit your application to multiple lenders to secure the lowest possible rate and the best terms — all with one soft credit check.
03
Real Specialists, Real Help
Your application is handled by a dedicated finance specialist — not a chatbot. Direct phone, email, and text support every step of the way.
04
Thousands of Vehicles
Access to thousands of new and pre-owned vehicles across Canada. We deliver right to your door in most provinces.

Frequently Asked

Your Questions, Answered

Everything you need to know about getting approved for an auto loan in Canada.

How much does Canada Car Approvals cost?

Our service is 100% free for drivers. We are paid by our lender and dealer partners only after you are approved and drive away — never by you.

Will applying hurt my credit score?

No. We use a soft credit check to pre-qualify you, which has zero impact on your credit score. A hard inquiry only happens later if you decide to move forward with a specific lender.

Can I get approved with bad credit or a bankruptcy?

Yes. We specialize in helping drivers with bad credit, no credit, consumer proposals, and discharged bankruptcies. We work with subprime and special-finance lenders that other dealerships do not have access to.

How quickly can I drive away?

Most approvals come back within 24 hours, often the same day. Once approved and your vehicle is selected, you can typically drive away in as little as 24–48 hours — or have it delivered to your door.

Do I need a down payment?

Not always. Many of our approvals come with $0 down. A down payment can lower your monthly payment and open up better rates, but it is not required for most credit situations.

What documents do I need?

Typically: a valid Canadian driver's licence, proof of income (recent pay stubs or bank statements), proof of address, and basic ID. Your finance specialist will tell you exactly what is needed for your specific lender.
